author: PC Gamer
text:
After a 4-year wait, Netflix announces Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming this fall
I really want to stay at your house. Again.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer says Obsidian has 'Karma Police' who go through games making sure every skill gets enough cool stuff to do: 'We're not gonna leave you out to dry'
"Some people think I'm preoccupied with balance."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Mina the Hollower will make her fighting game debut in a crossover next year
It's not the first time Rivals of Aether has included a character from Yacht Club's games.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Josh Sawyer says the Fallout TV show is an 'amazing adaptation' of a videogame, and 'one of the best that I've seen'
"I am very interested to see where it goes."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Meccha Chameleon proves an explosive hit with over 10 million copies sold
The indie evolution of prop hunt is taking Steam by storm.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Invincible VS devs would like to have guest characters like Spider-Man and Sub Zero: 'If we have that opportunity, we will definitely take it'
What's a gory fighting game without a few distinguished guests?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Here's what you want to see from Grand Theft Auto 6's radio stations: Phil Collins, conspiracy theory parodies, and… Gregorian chanting?
Vice City's about to get real weird.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The Binding of Isaac hits new all-time concurrent player count peak on Steam 12 years after release
That's a lot of tears.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sally Beaumont, voice actor in Old Skies and The Séance of Blake Manor, extols the virtues of narrative singleplayer games 'You can have lots of them in your PC toolbelt'
The voice of Old Skies' Fia Quinn guides us through the games on her PC.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Nightdive says compatibility with fan missions was a big priority for Thief Remastered, and there's one massive mod in particular it knew it had to get working
"Obviously the big one in the room is The Black Parade".

author: PC Gamer
text:
Creative Assembly wants to know which factions you wish to play as in Total War: Medieval 3, but whatever you do, don't ask to play as the Pope
Some factions are already "locked in".

author: PC Gamer
text:
Spyro speedrunner says a PC port of the original game is in the works, and it's being made with 'no AI'
The port runs at 60 FPS, supports true widescreen and has "no polygon wobble".

author: PC Gamer
text:
Skyrim's lead designer reckons releasing Elder Scrolls and Fallout games faster risks 'disappointing fans'
"The biggest risks of shortened schedules is quality, reduced features, polish, or bugs."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Magic's Marvel Super Heroes set fixes the biggest problems of its Spider-Man cards
"Avengers Assemble! And a couple of X-Men, and the Fantastic Four I guess."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Quantic Dream's Star Wars: Eclipse is struggling: 'We're understaffed,' say devs
The studio's first foray into open-world gaming is facing new hurdles.

author: PC Gamer
text:
As we stare down more $80 games, it rules that Star Wars Zero Company is $50
Thrifty gaming ain't dead yet.

author: PC Gamer
text:
To get Thief Remastered's cutscenes right, Nightdive brought on the dev behind the 1998 originals
Dan Thron is in the house.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Palworld 1.0 update has '27 pdf pages of changes and additions,' says publishing lead
"Losing my mind trying to make nice patch notes for Palworld 1.0…"

author: PC Gamer
text:
Riot delays 'last hit indicators' in League of Legends ranked mode after fan response: 'We want to get more data and feedback'
"We’ll keep them enabled, but off by default, for swiftplay, co-op vs AI, and normal draft."
